priya_plan.plan_summary: Create cmd/sweep2d/main.go as a thin CLI entrypoint that wires --p1-*/--p2-* axis flags and fixed-param flags into a sweep2d.Config2D, calls sweep2d.Run via cmdutil.BuildProvider, writes CSV to --out path or stdout, and prints DSR-corrected peak Sharpe to stderr.
priya_plan.approach: Mirror cmd/sweep/main.go structurally with two-axis flag parsing, strategy factory dispatch for sma-crossover and rsi-mean-reversion, CSV to --out or stdout, DSR to stderr.

build.build_summary: Created cmd/sweep2d/main.go and cmd/sweep2d/main_test.go. TDD order honored. flags2D struct keeps parseAndValidateFlags2D testable. factoryRegistry2D supports sma-crossover (p1=fast, p2=slow) and rsi-mean-reversion (p1=period, p2=oversold). writeCSVToWriter io.Writer helper used for smoke test. Quality gate passed in one round.
